vocab.example: Winning the championship was a true collective endeavor that required every player to pull their weight.

vocab.meaning: rèn luyện/thấm nhuần tính kỷ luật
vocab.example: Being on the rowing team helped instill discipline in me, as we had to be at the river by 5 AM every morning.
The atmosphere of mutual encouragement within the squad made even the most grueling drills enjoyable.

vocab.meaning: sự phối hợp mang tính chiến thuật
vocab.example: In basketball, strategic coordination between the point guard and the shooters is vital for a fluid offense.

vocab.meaning: tình bằng hữu trong thể thao
vocab.example: I joined the local cricket club primarily for the sporting fellowship and the chance to meet people from different walks of life.
Success in a relay race depends on harmonious collaboration during the baton exchange.

vocab.meaning: đạt được phong độ đỉnh cao
vocab.example: Our coach focused on sports psychology to help us attain peak performance under high-pressure situations.

vocab.meaning: sự tương tác/động lực giữa các cá nhân
vocab.example: Understanding the interpersonal dynamics of the team is just as important as physical training.
I’ve always had a fierce competitive spirit, so being part of a traveling soccer team was a perfect outlet for me.

vocab.meaning: trau dồi kỹ năng lãnh đạo
vocab.example: Serving as the captain of the swim team allowed me to cultivate leadership skills that I still use in my career today.
